assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking 'Istio version compatibility with K8s 1.32 (check Istio support matrix)' and mentions this in the pre-upgrade preparation phase

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions checking the 'Istio support matrix' with a link and includes this as a critical check before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response does not explicitly advise upgrading Istio first if compatibility issues exist - it focuses on the GKE upgrade sequence but doesn't address what to do if Istio needs upgrading

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response explains sidecar injection via mutating webhook in the 'Sidecar Injection Breaking' section and identifies it as a potential issue during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes verification steps to check sidecar injection is working and mentions testing that new pods get sidecar injection after upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes 'istioctl proxy-status' commands and mentions monitoring proxy status and version consistency in multiple sections

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands like 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands to check Istio components throughout the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response warns about 'Custom EnvoyFilter Incompatibility' and 'Service Discovery Lag' issues, and mentions avoiding 'split-brain mesh states' and proxy version mismatches
